title: Wandering Trader +
description: More trades for the wandering trader
body:
Tired of the Wandering Trader lacking useful items? ... No way! That's why I created this mod

This mod adds new trades to the Wandering Trader. It includes everything from unusual blocks and Nylium to all sorts of plants, spawners, lava buckets, and more. It's a simple but useful mod.

![Example of trades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf8cf97a1a337ac273041687b1a4d9778686a168.png)

thanks to Mcreator, the Mod Maker used in this project.
